title: Soil spectroscopy training workshop
text:
Preface
This is the training workshop textbook.

title: 1  Introduction
text: This is a section that gives an overview about soil spectroscopy.

title: 2  Processing
text: This is a section that provides a walk-through experience for spectral data processing and analysis.

title: 3  Modeling
text: In this section we introduce the modeling with spectroscopy data for soil properties estimation.
